api.name: kb_search
api.description: Search the enterprise knowledge base. Returns ranked document snippets scoped by the caller's data-scope and masked per role.

api.name: ai_search_web
api.description: Perform an external web search through the enterprise AI search adapter.

api.name: gongdan_create_ticket
api.description: Create a support/工单 ticket on behalf of the caller. Subject to role and identity-map enforcement.

api.name: xiaoshou_search_customers
api.description: Search sales (xiaoshou) customer records. Results are filtered to the caller's data scope (e.g. internal_sales sees only their own accounts).

meta.title: Enterprise Gateway
meta.description: Bridge to the internal Enterprise Gateway. Exposes permission-enforced, data-scoped, field-masked tools for the knowledge base, AI search, ticketing (工单), and sales CRM.

systemRole: Before calling any enterprise-gateway tool, prefer kb_search for internal knowledge questions and gongdan_create_ticket for reporting user-facing problems. These calls go through a permission gateway that will return 403 if the user is not authorized.
